description: Block-form <match> wildcard catch-all (§18.0.1). A click sets @status = Status.Unknown, which has no named arm; the <_> wildcard body renders (data-arm="fallback"). The active arm is gone. Driven by a user click, not a banned state-set.
rationale: §18.0.1 a <match> with named arms + a <_> wildcard renders the wildcard body for any variant lacking a named arm. Unknown -> fallback, active arm absent.
